nasb.text: Then He got up and left the synagogue, and entered Simon’s home. Now Simon’s mother-in-law was suffering from a high fever, and they asked Him to help her.

esv.text: And he arose and left the synagogue and entered Simon’s house. Now Simon’s mother-in-law was ill with a high fever, and they appealed to him on her behalf.

cnv.text: 他起身離開會堂，進入西門的家。西門的岳母正在發高熱，他們為她求耶穌。

ccb.text: 祂离开会堂，到了西门的家。那时，西门的岳母正在发高烧，众人就求耶稣医治她。

csbs.text: 耶稣起身离开会堂，进了西门的家。西门的岳母正发高烧，他们就为她求耶稣。
